title: Extracting Dates from Text
scenario: Extract the dates from the text 'The conference will be held on March 15, 2024, and April 1, 2024.' and format them as 'MM/DD/YYYY'.
constraints: Must be in the format MM/DD/YYYY

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the dates are correctly extracted and formatted as 'MM/DD/YYYY'.
Check if the prompt adheres to the constraints of extracting two dates and being in the format MM/DD/YYYY.
Check if the generated text is grammatically correct and valid.
